mapper.select: select l.line_id, l.line_code, l.line_name, l.process_type, l.product_type, l.status, l.capacity, l.capacity_unit, l.create_time, l.update_time, l.workshop_id, w.workshop_code, w.workshop_name, w.ent_code, e.ent_name from t_ent_production_line l left join t_ent_produce_workshop w on w.workshop_id = l.workshop_id left join t_bas_enterprise e on e.ent_code = w.ent_code where l.line_id = #{lineId}
select line_id from t_ent_production_line where workshop_id = #{workshopId} and line_code = #{lineCode} limit 1
mapper.insert:
insert into t_ent_production_line
line_id, line_code, line_name, workshop_id, process_type, product_type, status, capacity, capacity_unit,
#{lineId}, #{lineCode}, #{lineName}, #{workshopId}, #{processType}, #{productType}, #{status}, #{capacity}, #{capacityUnit},
mapper.select: select line_id from t_ent_production_line where workshop_id = (select workshop_id from t_ent_production_line where line_id = #{lineId}) and line_code = #{lineCode} and line_id != #{lineId} limit 1
